name_en: 🔥New Arrival🆕 Medium Deer Leather Flamenco Purse Handbag 👜 Celebrity Style Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with a signature knot on the side. This medium size is crafted from deer leather 🥰*Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Removable donut ⛓ charm adorned with 💚Anagram Pebble *🧸Ultra-light, ultra-soft, and scratch-resistant, easy to match. Comes with two shoulder straps, suitable for single shoulder or crossbody. Magnetic closure*Suede lining* LOE💎WE Silver Plated Gift 🎁
